name: Mirai e Kimi to.
overview: This heartwarming family drama centers around people at various crossroads of life, like reconsidering ambitions and professions, getting married, or starting a second career. Each member has their fair share of struggles that they can't share, yet the Watari family living in the small seaside town starts their morning with a scrumptious breakfast together.

trailers.title: 『ミライヘキミト。』本予告｜マイナビ50周年記念 オリジナルWEB映画
